author: ajsutton
content:
That's exactly what I wanted.  Folks were trying to tell me there was a 5+ block reorg on sepolia and I refused to believe it.
I'm pretty sure it was actually the consensus-aware proxy  that wound up effectively truncating the chain rather than an actual reorg.
